vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-swarm
vBRIEFInfo.description: Adopt Option A (always-structured) for every user-facing question; mode-restore after Rule 6 gate; preamble guidance; setup SKILL.md phase-transition prose fix.

plan.title: Interview skill: always-structured rendering (Option A) + mode-restore + preamble guidance (#478)

narratives.Overview: Per Amendment 1 + reviewer comment, adopt Option A: every user-facing question MUST render via the structured tool; only the Rule 6 Confirmation Gate and non-question status updates may be plain-text. rendering_policy frontmatter flag and taxonomy appendix are OUT OF SCOPE (belong to #476, deferred).
narratives.Problem: Taxonomy-based rules fail: agent reproduced the exact bug its own taxonomy forbade 12 minutes after filing. Also: after Rule 6 plain-text gate fires, agents get stuck in plain-text mode for subsequent prompts.
narratives.Action: Edit skills/deft-directive-interview/SKILL.md to add always-structured MUST rule, Rule 6 mode-restore clause, preamble-placement guidance. Edit skills/deft-directive-setup/SKILL.md: replace every 'Ask if user wants to continue to Phase X' SHOULD with a MUST 'Emit a structured-tool question' for Phase 1->2, 2->3, 3->build. Add content tests.
narratives.Test: tests/content/test_interview_always_structured.py asserts always-structured MUST rule exists; Rule 6 mode-release clause present; preamble-above-tool-call guidance present; setup SKILL.md no longer contains 'Ask if user wants to continue'; anti-pattern against 'because preamble was long' is present.
narratives.Outcome: Interview + setup skills enforce always-structured rendering via prose rules; mode-restore and preamble guidance prevent the two observed failure modes without introducing rendering_policy frontmatter.

items.title: Follow directive guidelines: AGENTS.md, deft/main.md, deft/QUICK-START.md, conventional commits, task check before commit
Add Option A always-structured MUST rule to interview SKILL.md
Add Rule 6 mode-restore clause (plain-text does not stick)
Rewrite setup SKILL.md phase-transition prompts as structured-tool MUSTs
Explicitly do NOT add rendering_policy frontmatter (reserved for #476)
